untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'congestion zone' detection, 'prior trend' detection, 'sufficient length' evaluation, and 'yearly high proximity' which require custom calculations not available in allowed indicators. Market regime labels (BEAR_MARKET, BULL_MARKET) are not in allowed regime list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY). Success rates and performance metrics are backtest outputs, not tradeable conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated using ADX_14 for trend confirmation (>25 indicates strong trend), Donchian breakouts for reversal pattern detection, and pivot points for reversal levels. These are proxies for the original signal's reversal pattern concept. A proper implementation would require: (1) explicit congestion zone detection logic, (2) custom trend length measurement, (3) yearly high/low reference points, (4) regime classification system that maps to BEAR_MARKET/BULL_MARKET concepts.
